title: misanteca puchury-major
side_effects: Misanteca puchury-major can have side effects if used improperly, such as liver damage, allergic reactions, and respiratory issues in some individuals. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to stomach problems, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, it may also cause headaches, dizziness, and increased heart rate. Improper preparation or dosage can exacerbate these side effects, emphasizing the need for proper guidance and caution when using this plant for health benefits.
